title: Pixel RPG icons
description:
A library of public domain pixel-art RPG icons in resource pack format.

Requires a mod to be used.
body:
A collection of 496 RPG-themed pixel-art icons, sourced from the [public domain](https://opengameart.org/content/496-pixel-art-icons-for-medievalfantasy-rpg).

The icons are split into the following categories:
- Accessories
- Armour
- Food
- Items
- Potions
- Shields
- Skills
- Weapons

These can be used by other mods such as [pufferfish's skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills) mod to add icons to skills.

This resource pack changes nothing on its own. Think of it as a library that other mods can use.

You can find an example use-case on my modpack's ([Cinnamon](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cinnamon)) [github](https://github.com/Allexio/Cinnamon/blob/main/modpack/config/puffish_skills/categories/warrior/definitions.json).
